displayName: A4 — HMAC chain break (ADR-0017 — tamper-evident audit)

documentation.content: Triggered when [generateChainHash] previous hash mismatch or [verifyChainHash] mismatch appears in any function log. Single occurrence is a P0 incident: indicates either tampering, secret rotation without baseline reset, or a verification bug. CTO + RT must be paged immediately. Compliance: RDC 978 Art. 128, ADR-0017. Runbook: docs/observability/RUNBOOK.md#a4-hmac-chain-break

conditionMatchedLog.filter: resource.type="cloud_function" AND severity="ERROR" AND (textPayload:"[generateChainHash] previous hash mismatch" OR textPayload:"[verifyChainHash] mismatch" OR textPayload:"chain-hash-mismatch")
